title: taraxacum dolichocentrum
intro: Taraxacum dolichocentrum, also known as the long-stalked dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional herbal medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum dolichocentrum include its potential to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and support the immune system. Taraxacum dolichocentrum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
